raw_consumer_statement:
Citibank alerted me of unusual activity on my credit card on XX/XX/XXXX. I checked my app and saw XXXX pending charges that I had no knowledge of. I called Citibank immediately on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX  to dispute these charges. I informed them that the card was in my possession at all times, not lost or given to anyone else to use. They canceled my card and sent me a new card and opened a fraud investigation. I received an email confirming this investigation. 

I activated my new card but all of the fraud charges amounting to XXXX XXXX  were transferred to my new card and a minimum payment was expected by XX/XX/XXXX. 

I called a XXXX time on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX, asking why I was expected to pay on these fraudulent charges and I was concerned about late charges and fees. I was told they were still investigating. 

No further correspondence was received from Citibank to my email on file. 

I called for the XXXX time on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX MT. The representative yelled at me, called me crazy and refused to confirm if any further emails had been sent by the Fraud investigators, requesting for additional information. She then hung up on me.

I now have a balance on my credit card which Citibank is delaying a resolution but expecting a payment on.
